nodes.label: PDF Translation Upload
nodes.rationale: Admin users can upload a PDF of pre-translated survey questions to auto-populate translation fields, avoiding manual typing for large surveys. The translation is saved to ai_analyses for review before final save.

nodes.label: POST /api/surveys/{survey_id}/translation/upload
nodes.rationale: New FastAPI endpoint accepting multipart form data (PDF file + language parameter), extracting text via pdfplumber, mapping to question UUIDs via Gemini, and upserting into ai_analyses.

nodes.label: pdfplumber
nodes.rationale: Python library for extracting text from PDFs. Chosen over other PDF libraries because it provides clean text extraction suitable for LLM ingestion.

nodes.label: Google Gemini API
nodes.rationale: Used for structured JSON extraction of translated survey content from raw PDF text. Chosen for its JSON mode with low temperature for deterministic output mapping.

nodes.label: gemini-3.5-flash
nodes.rationale: The specific Gemini model used for translation extraction, selected for fast response times and structured JSON output capability.

nodes.label: ai_analyses Table
nodes.rationale: Supabase table storing AI-generated analysis results including translations. Uses analysis_type key (translation_fr, translation_zh) to namespace different AI outputs per survey. No new DB migration needed — reuses existing schema.

nodes.label: Translation Mode UI
nodes.rationale: A blue info banner on the admin edit page visible when language is not English, showing an upload PDF button alongside the warning that structural changes are disabled.

nodes.label: Question Mapping by Position Index
nodes.rationale: Translations are mapped to question UUIDs by 0-based index position within survey sections, relying on PDF questions appearing in the same order as the reference. Avoids fragile text matching across languages.

nodes.label: PDF Text Extraction
nodes.rationale: Raw text is extracted from all PDF pages using pdfplumber before being sent to Gemini. No OCR or layout analysis needed — plain text extraction is sufficient for LLM-based structured parsing.

nodes.label: Admin Edit Page
nodes.rationale: The page at src/app/admin/edit/[id]/page.tsx where admins manage survey questions and translations. Structural changes (add/delete questions/options) are disabled when in translation mode to prevent data inconsistency.

nodes.label: questions Table
nodes.rationale: Supabase table storing all survey questions with fields: id (UUID), survey_id, type, question_text, options (JSONB), order_index, is_required, is_conditional.

nodes.label: Question Types
nodes.rationale: Supported question types: multiple_choice, short_answer, rating_scale, likert_scale, section_header, checkbox, dropdown, ranking. Each type stores its configuration in the polymorphic options JSONB column.

nodes.label: Supabase (PostgreSQL/PostgREST)
nodes.rationale: The backend database platform providing PostgreSQL storage with PostgREST auto-generated API. All survey data, questions, answers, and AI analyses are stored here.

nodes.label: FastAPI Backend
nodes.rationale: Python web framework hosting the API at api/index.py. Provides REST endpoints for survey CRUD, session management, answer storage, and AI-powered features.

nodes.label: Next.js Frontend
nodes.rationale: TypeScript React frontend using Next.js with Tailwind CSS. Pages for admin create/edit/results and respondent-facing survey experience.

nodes.label: Gemini Temperature 0.1
nodes.rationale: Low temperature setting for Gemini calls ensures deterministic, consistent JSON output when mapping PDF text to structured survey translations.

nodes.label: File Validation (PDF)
nodes.rationale: Upload endpoint validates file extension (.pdf), MIME type, and file size (max 10MB). Early rejection prevents unnecessary processing and provides clear error feedback.

nodes.label: Structural Changes Disabled in Translation Mode
nodes.rationale: Adding, deleting, or reordering questions and options is blocked when the admin is editing in a non-English language. Prevents inconsistencies between the English reference structure and its translations.

nodes.label: Rich Text in Translations
nodes.rationale: Translated question text may contain HTML markup like <strong>, <em> tags, preserving formatting from the original English content in other languages.
